name: skena
description: Visual research canvas for VS Code — renders JSON Canvas files as interactive node graphs with rich content previews, connected to a markdown knowledge vault.

skena.vaults.markdownDescription:
Named vaults for `vault://` URI resolution. Each vault maps a short name to a root directory on disk.

Example (Obsidian vault):
```json
[
  { "name": "notes", "path": "~/docs/my-obsidian-vault" }
]
```
Files are referenced as `vault://notes/folder/file.md` (path relative to vault root).

name.description: Short identifier used in vault:// URIs, e.g. 'notes'

path.description: Absolute or ~/... path to the vault root directory

directories.description: Subdirectories to index for search. Omit (or set ["."] ) to index the entire vault recursively.

skena.vaultDirectories.description: Global fallback: directories to scan in each vault when a vault entry has no per-vault 'directories' list. Use ["."] (the default) to scan the entire vault root recursively.

skena.workspacePatterns.description: File patterns to index in workspace

skena.autoSaveDelay.description: Canvas auto-save debounce delay in ms

skena.notion.description: Notion MCP server integration for vault://notion/<page-id> URIs

skena.ai.apiKey.markdownDescription:
API key for the AI companion.
- **anthropic** provider: Anthropic API key (falls back to `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` env var)
- **openai-compat** provider: OpenAI / Groq / etc. key. For **Ollama** set this to any non-empty string (e.g. `"ollama"`).

skena.ai.model.markdownDescription:
Model used by the floating AI companion. Applies to all providers.
- **anthropic**: full id, e.g. `claude-opus-4-5`, `claude-sonnet-4-5`.
- **harness**: full id or a CLI alias like `opus`, `sonnet`, `haiku`.

skena.ai.provider.markdownDescription:
LLM provider for the AI companion.
- **anthropic**: Anthropic API (needs `skena.ai.apiKey`).
- **openai-compat**: Ollama, Groq, OpenAI, LM Studio, or any OpenAI-format endpoint.
- **harness**: drive the local `claude` CLI — NO API key (uses your Claude Code `/login`); tools run via the bundled skena MCP server.

skena.ai.harnessPath.markdownDescription: Path to the `claude` CLI for the **harness** provider. Defaults to `claude` on PATH; falls back to `~/.local/bin/claude` if not found.

skena.ai.harnessPermissionMode.markdownDescription:
Permission mode for the **harness** provider.
- **acceptEdits** (default): auto-accepts file reads/edits within the workspace + `skena.ai.harnessAddDirs`. Pair with `harnessAllowedTools` to also pre-approve Bash etc.
- **default**: stricter — file writes are blocked too.
- **bypassPermissions**: runs ALL tools anywhere with no checks — full power, no directory sandbox, no guardrails.
- **plan**: read-only planning, never executes tools.

skena.ai.harnessIsolate.markdownDescription: Run the **harness** companion in an isolated Claude Code profile (`~/.skena/cc-profile`): keyless auth (creds copied) but WITHOUT your global `~/.claude` hooks — eliminating the per-message SessionStart token tax. Your MCP servers from `~/.claude.json` are re-injected automatically. Turn off to use your full global config (hooks, memory, skills). Applies on next session (Reset/reopen).

skena.ai.harnessAllowedTools.markdownDescription: Tools the **harness** companion may use WITHOUT a prompt (headless can't prompt, so un-listed gated tools are denied). `Bash` allows all shell commands; scope it with patterns like `Bash(git *)`, `Bash(ls *)` for more safety. Ignored under `bypassPermissions`. Applies on next session (Reset/reopen).

skena.ai.harnessMaxTurns.description: Max agent turns per message for the harness provider (bounds tool-use loops).

skena.ai.harnessAddDirs.markdownDescription: Extra directories the **harness** companion may read/write beyond the canvas workspace (e.g. `~/projects`, `~/.claude`, knowledge vaults). Configured `skena.vaults` paths are added automatically. Non-existent entries are skipped. Ignored under `bypassPermissions` (which has no directory sandbox). Applies on the next session — Reset (⟲) or reopen the canvas to take effect.

skena.ai.session.restore.markdownDescription: Harness provider: resume the prior Claude Code session for a canvas when it is reopened (via `--resume`), so the conversation continues with full prior context. If the stored session can't be resumed, it falls back to a fresh one.

skena.ai.baseURL.markdownDescription:
Base URL for the `openai-compat` provider. Examples:
- Ollama: `http://localhost:11434/v1`
- LM Studio: `http://localhost:1234/v1`
- Groq: `https://api.groq.com/openai/v1`

skena.chat.description: AI chat node backend. backend: claude | ollama | openai

skena.notebook.description: Notebook rendering options. showSourceCells: show code source alongside output (default false — outputs only)

skena.colors.description: Canvas color palette (matches Obsidian color codes 1-6)
